name: daily-report
description: Generate daily summary reports from web sources on a given topic
instructions:
When generating a daily report:
1. Use web_fetch to search multiple news sources for the topic
2. Try at least 3-5 sources (RSS feeds, news sites, blogs)
3. For each article found: extract title, source, date, and summary
4. Write a structured markdown report with:
   - Date/time header
   - Executive summary (3-5 sentences)
   - Individual article sections with links
   - Key takeaways at the end
5. Save the report as a .md file in the project directory
6. Store key findings in memory for future reference
